title: TaperFlangeChannelProfile
description: TaperFlangeChannelProfile: C-shaped profile with tapered flanges of the same length and thickness.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeWidth.description: Full width between the extreme fibres of the web to the toe of the flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Mean thickness of the flange, taken at 1/2 the flange width Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeSlope.description: Slope of the flange inner faces, generally from 0 to 1/6. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of the flanges and the inner face of web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the end of the flanges. Value must be smaller or equal to the thickness of the flange at the tip. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

MirrorAboutLocalZ.description: If true, the section is mirrored about its local z-axis, resulting in a backwards facing C-shape.

Edges.description: Edge curves that match the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
